name: Lbi Chicken
recipeIngredient: No-fat olive oil spray            1/4 lb Uncooked spaghetti
1 Orange bell pepper, cut in          1 c  Chicken broth
1/2 cup Scallions, sliced (white            2 tbsp Marsala wine
1/2 lb Chicken breast meat, cut in         1 tbsp Flour, dissolved in
recipeInstructions:
1. Start a pot of water boiling for the spaghetti.
2. Cut up the chicken and vegetables and sprinkle the chicken with pepper.
3. Combine the chicken broth, soy sauce, and Marsala wine. Sprinkle this sauce mixture with pepper.
4. Spray a large skillet with olive oil spray and cook the vegetables over high heat for about 1 minute.
5. Add the chicken to the skillet and stir-fry until no longer pink.
6. Pour in the sauce and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat, and simmer uncovered while cooking the spaghetti.
8. Add the spaghetti to the boiling water and cook for 10 minutes or according to package directions.
9. After the spaghetti has finished cooking, add flour and water to the chicken mixture in the skillet. Increase heat and cook until the sauce has thickened.
10. Serve the chicken over the spaghetti.
